contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Bolts in heat or direct sun — thrives on a cool north-facing windowsill.

notes: The forgotten fines herbes herb. Prefers cool and shade — one of very few culinary herbs that actively thrives on a north-facing windowsill. Anise-like flavour. Bolts in heat.
